value:
Thank you for reaching out, and I apologize for the delay in communication on your case. I can see you've provided your case reference numbers (CAS19708536CB92N2 and CRM0326600), which is helpful. I understand how frustrating it must be to have submitted all required documentation without hearing back.

I'd like to help move this forward right away. Could you briefly let me know what your case is regarding so I can look into the status and get you a proper update? Once I have that context, I'll check on where things stand and ensure your case officer follows up with you promptly.
